evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Improving data testing, documentation, lineage, and reliability
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Rigour signals (testing, documentation, lineage, reliability) dominate with no velocity/speed language present.
evidence.domain_risk: Designing business data models for users, subscriptions, content, and revenue
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: OTT/streaming subscription and advertising revenue data affects business decisions but no financial reporting, regulatory, or compliance language is present.
evidence.data_team_maturity: Building source-of-truth datasets and analytical data marts
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: An established source-of-truth framework and metric standardisation across multiple business areas (AVOD, SVOD, personalization) indicate a data function that exists and is scaling.
evidence.jd_authorship: Experience with Redshift, BigQuery, Snowflake, Databricks, or similar analytical warehouses
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Specific warehouse platforms and dbt experience give a concrete picture of the technical environment.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Developing analytical support for advertising, subscription, and product initiatives
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Advertising/subscription revenue (commercial) and product development/personalization initiatives are named with roughly equal weight, giving mixed orientation.
evidence.autonomy_level: building trusted data models, metric frameworks, and business-ready datasets across multiple business areas
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Building foundational, cross-business metric frameworks and source-of-truth datasets is direction-setting, strategic work.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No AI tool or AI infrastructure mention appears anywhere in the extracted JD text.
evidence.testing_framing: Improving data testing, documentation, lineage, and reliability
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Data testing is named as an owned responsibility alongside documentation, lineage, and reliability, with an explicit improvement/ownership verb.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Improving data testing, documentation, lineage, and reliability
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Data reliability and lineage are a stated concern but framed as pipeline/reporting quality rather than compliance or regulatory risk.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Building source-of-truth datasets and analytical data marts
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The role mixes building new source-of-truth datasets/marts with improving existing testing, documentation and reliability practices.
evidence.loss_aversion: Improving data testing, documentation, lineage, and reliability — reflects concern for data reliability rather than explicit compliance/regulatory risk.
